experiments.name: Systematic comparison of EWC and SI baselines against best TCL config from robus
experiments.notes: Auto-generated manifest for autonomous run. Spec description: Completed sweeps (phase12_ewc_sweep, phase13_si_sweep) exist but lack direct head-to-head comparison with candidate TCL method using identical evaluation protocol. This comparison is essential to validate whether the low-tuning approach actually outperforms established baselines, not just shows stability within itself.
